name: Caramel Illini Bars
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Grease and flour a 9x13 inch pan.
In a heavy saucepan, combine caramels and 1/3 cup evaporated milk. Cook on low heat, stirring until the caramels melt. Set aside.
In a large mixing bowl, combine dry cake mix, butter, 1/3 cup melted evaporated milk, and pecans. Stir by hand until the dough holds together.
Press half of the dough into the prepared pan. Reserve the remaining dough for topping.
Bake at 350 degrees for 6 minutes.
Sprinkle chocolate bits over the crust and spread caramel mixture over the bits.
Crumble the reserved dough over the caramel mixture.
Return to oven and bake an additional 15 to 18 minutes.
Cool slightly, then refrigerate at least 30 minutes.
